covered_report_window: Tuesday, July 21, 2026 after U.S. market close plus Wednesday, July 22, 2026 before U.S. market open.
market_context_summary: At the 1:05 p.m. ET run time, U.S. markets were still open. The tape was rebounding after a three-day slide, led by semiconductors and AI-linked names, while oil/geopolitical pressure and a heavy Q2 earnings week kept guidance risk elevated.

ranked_companies.key_risk_to_call: Stock near highs; no guide raise
ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: IQOS/ZYN and smoke-free mix support a constructive print if full-year EPS confidence is maintained.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $2.03 EPS and $10.5B revenue; focus is smoke-free shipment growth, ZYN/IQOS share, gross margin, and FY2026 EPS tone.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Smoke-free volume strength, resilient pricing, and intact or raised EPS guidance.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Sell-the-news reaction if smoke-free strength is already priced in or guidance is only maintained.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: OptionSlam showed a 5.37% weekly implied move and 1.17 short interest; recent stock strength raises bar risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: PMI Q1 materials showed strong smoke-free growth and a 2026 EPS outlook; public calendars place Q2 EPS near $2.03.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Trading volatility, Schwab peer strength, and client-activity growth support upside if DARTs and margin loans stay strong.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $0.58 EPS and $1.66B revenue; focus is DARTs, client accounts, margin balances, and NII.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Trading activity and account growth beat, helped by volatile markets.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: The large YTD move could make a good quarter insufficient.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investing.com cited a 4.6% implied move; OptionSlam showed 6.85% weekly implied move and 2.5 short interest.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: IBD preview cited expected EPS growth of 25.5% and revenue growth of 21.5%.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: AT&T's fiber and wireless metrics can support a positive reaction if Q2 confirms free-cash-flow ramp and converged customer growth.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $0.59 EPS and $31.5B-$31.8B revenue; focus is postpaid phone adds, fiber/fixed-wireless adds, FCF, and Starlink commentary.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Postpaid and internet adds beat expectations while FCF guidance stays intact.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Capex-heavy fiber build, weaker broadband, or sharper Starlink disruption commentary.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: Investing.com cited a 4.3% implied move; defensive setup lowers reversal risk versus growth names.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: IBD preview cited $0.59 EPS, $31.82B revenue, about 287K postpaid phone adds, and similar broadband adds.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: CME's H1 volume strength and operating leverage support upside if Q2 revenue conversion and fee mix hold.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $2.98 EPS and $1.71B revenue; focus is ADV, rate-per-contract mix, and adjusted operating margin.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Rates, equity index, energy, and metals activity convert into stronger revenue and margins.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Fee mix or expense disappointment could blunt the reaction because Q2 ADV was partly known.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: OptionSlam showed a 4.94% weekly implied move and 1.66 short interest.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: CME's July presentation showed H1 2026 total ADV up 10% year over year, including metals up 56%.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: D.R. Horton's same-day guide cut reinforces risk that incentives, affordability, and orders pressure Pulte's Q2 reaction.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $2.38 EPS and $3.98B revenue; focus is orders, cancellations, incentives, community count, and home-sale gross margin.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: If Q2 is confirmed as the margin trough and orders hold better than feared, the stock can rally.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak orders, higher incentives, or softer delivery/revenue guidance would confirm the negative read-through.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; de-risked homebuilder sentiment keeps reversal risk below high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Pulte Q1 gross margin fell to 24.4% from 27.5%; Barron's reported D.R. Horton cut FY revenue and closing guidance.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Fuel volatility and Alaska-Hawaiian integration risk create downside skew unless pricing and outlook materially offset the cost shock.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around a $0.97 loss on $4.10B revenue; focus is fuel cost recovery, demand, capacity, and whether suspended guidance is restored.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Less-bad fuel commentary or strong fare demand could squeeze the stock higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Persistent fuel pressure, weak pricing, or integration cost concerns would validate downside.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; low expectations and airline beta keep reversal risk high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Alaska confirms after-close timing; prior reporting said guidance was suspended because fuel costs were highly uncertain.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Power backlog and AI/grid demand support upside, but the stock needs a guide-confirming or guide-raising print after a major rerating.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is near $3.23 EPS and $10.78B revenue; focus is Power orders, backlog conversion, margins, and 2026 guidance.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Orders and margin beat with stronger 2026 confidence could validate the AI power-infrastructure thesis.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: A merely good quarter, slower order growth, or no guide raise could spark a sell-the-news move.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: OptionsAI showed expected move near 9.6%; OptionSlam showed 8.43% weekly implied move and 4.35 short interest.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: GEV Q1 release showed $18.3B orders, $13.0B sequential backlog growth, and raised 2026 guidance.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Prior guidance flagged Q2 revenue and EBITDA pressure from Middle East disruption, leaving a downside skew unless recovery visibility improves.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $0.92 EPS and $1.06B revenue; focus is Q2 revenue/EBITDA versus guide, free cash flow, and 2H recovery confidence.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: A clear recovery path and resilient free cash flow could reverse the downside setup.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Weak Q2 revenue, lower EBITDA, or more disruption commentary would pressure the stock.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; energy-services cyclicality keeps reversal risk elevated.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Weatherford Q1 revenue fell 3% year over year and adjusted EBITDA fell 8%; guidance sources cited Q2 revenue of $1.017B-$1.110B and EBITDA of $195M-$220M.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Discover integration costs and consumer-credit scrutiny create a downside skew, but a low bar keeps reversal risk elevated.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $4.87 EPS and $15.68B revenue; FactSet preview cited adjusted EPS around $4.67 and revenue near $15.77B. Focus is NCOs, reserves, marketing expense, and Discover costs.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Cleaner NCOs, reserve stability, and credible integration synergy commentary could drive relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Higher loss reserves or expense pressure would confirm consumer-credit concerns.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: OptionSlam showed a 5.32% weekly implied move and 1.89 short interest; stock weakness raises relief-rally risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Barron's highlighted NCOs, loan-loss reserves, marketing expense, and Discover integration as key watch items.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Ratings issuance and Moody's Analytics momentum lean positive, though the stock likely needs more than an in-line confirmation.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $4.23 EPS and $2.07B revenue; focus is MIS issuance revenue, MA ARR, margins, and AI/data demand.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Strong debt issuance and analytics ARR can sustain the Q1 record-results pattern.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Softer leveraged finance or unchanged guidance could cap upside.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; mature data/ratings model keeps reversal risk moderate.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Moody's Q1 release cited record MIS revenue, MA ARR growth, and reaffirmed FY2026 revenue/EPS guidance.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Pega Cloud ACV and Blueprint AI momentum can support upside, but the prior Q1 miss makes guidance quality decisive.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $0.23-$0.43 EPS and $427M-$430M revenue depending on source; focus is total ACV, Pega Cloud ACV, FCF, and AI/Blueprint demand.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Cloud ACV acceleration or stronger AI demand commentary could revive the software narrative.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Another revenue/EPS miss or weak ACV/guidance would sink the stock despite a good AI story.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; premium software and prior miss keep reversal risk high.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Pega Q1 release showed Pega Cloud ACV up 29%, total ACV up 12%, and FCF above $200M; MarketBeat noted the prior EPS/revenue miss.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: China new-equipment weakness and guidance scrutiny create a mild downside skew, but the stock already looks de-rated.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $1.01 EPS and $3.72B revenue; focus is service growth, China new equipment, margin, and 2026 outlook.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Stable service growth and a maintained FY guide could support relief.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: China/order weakness or a lower guide would pressure shares.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; the de-rated stock raises relief risk.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Otis Q1 sales rose 6% but organic sales were only up 1%; MarketBeat cited FY2026 EPS guidance of $4.20-$4.24.

ranked_companies.one_sentence_thesis: Chubb has strong underwriting and investment-income support, but the score stayed just below a directional edge after recent stock strength.
ranked_companies.market_expectation_summary: Consensus is around $6.58 EPS and $15.86B revenue; focus is combined ratio, cat losses, reserves, and adjusted net investment income.
ranked_companies.upside_case_summary: Low catastrophe losses and resilient net investment income could push the stock higher.
ranked_companies.downside_case_summary: Reserve or cat-loss surprises could overpower a strong headline result.
ranked_companies.options_or_positioning_summary: No reliable current implied-move source found; insurance setup is less crowded than AI/growth names.
ranked_companies.analyst_revision_summary: Chubb Q1 showed an 84.0% P&C combined ratio, strong premium growth, and core operating EPS of $6.82; Zacks cited Q2 adjusted net investment income guidance of $1.825B-$1.85B.

qualified_names.why: Highest consensus score, high evidence quality, low disparity, and reversal risk below 40.
Clear activity metric, strong consensus score, and reversal risk at or below the cutoff.
Clear postpaid/fiber/FCF driver, low disparity, and lower reversal risk.
Negative homebuilder read-through, absolute score above 30, and reversal risk below 40.
Low disparity, strong evidence quality, and clear ADV/rate-volatility driver.

excluded_high_reversal_or_weak_names.reason: Positive score, but reversal risk 49 from high-bar AI/power expectations.
Negative score, but reversal risk 46 from less-bad fuel and demand relief.
Negative score, but reversal risk 45 from low-bar second-half recovery relief.
Negative score below allocation threshold and reversal risk 44 from credit relief.
Positive score below top threshold and reversal risk 46 after prior miss/high software bar.
Score below threshold and reversal risk 43 from de-rated China risk.
Neutral score below allocation threshold despite solid evidence.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
